name: Ice Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Square semi-sweet baking chocolate, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crumb crust and set aside.
2. Place the vanilla ice cream in a large mixing bowl and cut into squares.
3. Microwave at 10% (low) for 2-1/2 to 3-1/2 minutes, or until softened. If your microwave does not have a 10% setting, use 30% (medium-low).
4. Add the cream de menthe, chocolate, and half of the peppermint candy to the bowl.
5. Beat at medium speed until smooth.
6. Spoon the mixture into the prepared crust.
7. Sprinkle with the remaining peppermint candy.
8. Freeze for about 5 hours, or until firm.
